piper_bin.description: Path or name of the piper executable. The default expects piper to be on $PATH.

voice_id.description: Piper voice ID to auto-download on first use (e.g. en_GB-northern_english_male-medium). Set via the setup wizard.

voice_model_path.description: Optional override: filesystem path to a Piper voice model (.onnx). Leave blank to auto-download and use voice_id.

ffmpeg_bin.description: Path or name of ffmpeg, used to convert Piper's WAV output to OGG/Opus for Telegram voice notes.

max_chars.description: Skip TTS for replies longer than this many characters. Voice notes for very long replies feel punishing on the listener side.

default_enabled.description: Whether new chats default to voice on. Most users want to opt in per chat with /voice on.
